underlying_goal: Evaluar y mejorar la configuración de Pi como sistema de trabajo con agentes IA, enfocado en reducir tokens y mantener un harness mínimo y fiable
friction_detail: User pushed back on adding too many tokens and phpstan command, wanted only surgical changes
brief_summary: User wanted evaluation and surgical improvements to their Pi agent configuration for minimal token usage; assistant reviewed the setup, proposed improvements, implemented memory tools and template enhancements, and verified web_fetch functionality.
user_instructions_to_assistant: haz los de memoria, como tools dentro de la extensión igual que el resto
